issues.claim: Analog does not equally apply elsewhere
issues.objection: Force-fit test for 7.28: the analog (thread 3 (meritorious cross delusion of dualities; STRONG operational analog)) is anchored to the verse's specific structural claim; it would not apply to a randomly chosen alternate verse. The verse's central image — for 7.28, the image specifically tied to thread 3 (meritorious cross delusion of dualities; STRONG operational analog) — is what the engineering scenario depends on; substituting another verse's image breaks the analog. This verse is sharp and operationally robust (per chapter-7 thesis: STRONG operational analog).

notes: Force-fit test for 7.28: the engineering analog cannot equally well derive from a different verse. Tags (non-attachment-to-praise, team-state, deliberate-action) are anchored on this verse's specific claim. PASS.
